name: Araya's Place
address_2: 10246 Main St Ste C, Bellevue, WA 98004
description: Classic Thai — Pad Thai, Massaman Banana Curry, Avocado Curry, Cashew Delight, and Tom Yum soups. Broad menu of curries, stir-fries, noodles, and appetizers.

name: The Bayside Cafe
address_1: 2913 West Marine View Dr, Everett, WA 98201
description: 100% plant-based café in historic downtown Everett. Vegan comfort food — burgers, hot dogs, sandwiches, nachos — with craft beers. Winner, Best Vegan Restaurant 2024 Best of Western Washington.

name: Box Bar
description: Casual plant-based spot offering brunch, dinner, and crafted cocktails in West Seattle. 21+ only.

name: Brown Sugar Baking Company
description: Black woman-owned vegan specialty bakery. Cinnamon buns, Pop-V-Tarts, brownies, custom event cakes. 100% peanut-free, nut-free, dairy-free, egg-free.

name: Cafe Red
address_1: 7148 Martin Luther King Jr Way S, Seattle, WA 98118
description: All-vegan café and coffee bar with artisanal coffees, pesto breakfast sandwiches, burritos, mac & cheese, hash browns, and sweet treats.

name: Cafe Wylde
description: 100% vegan organic café in downtown Everett. Smoothies, juices, sandwiches, tacos, burritos, grain bowls, and raw cheesecake desserts.

name: Chu Minh Tofu & Vegan Deli
address_2: 6754 Martin Luther King Jr Way S, Seattle, WA 98118
description: Vietnamese deli and tofu shop with all-you-can-eat buffet, pho, spring rolls, noodle soups, and standout sandwiches including Spicy Tofu Banh Mi.

name: Cinnaholic
description: 100% vegan cinnamon roll bakery. Customize gooey rolls with frosting flavors (cream cheese, almond, lemon, marshmallow) and toppings like cookie dough and fresh fruit. Featured on Shark Tank.

name: Dough Joy Donuts
description: Colorful vegan donut shops with creative rotating flavors, playful aesthetics, and espresso at each location. Two Seattle locations.

name: El Borracho
description: Lively plant-based Mexican bar and taqueria with fully vegan tacos, burritos, nachos, and refreshing drinks near Pike Place Market. All ages before 5pm; 21+ only after 5pm.

name: Frankie & Jo's
address_3: 4619 Village Terrace Dr NE, Seattle, WA 98105
description: Popular ice cream shop known for creamy, inventive plant-based flavors with seasonal rotations and standout flavor combinations. Three Seattle scoop shops.

name: Georgetown Liquor Company
address_1: 5501 Airport Way S Ste B, Seattle, WA 98108
description: Punk-bar-meets-pub grub with all-vegan menu featuring sandwiches, wraps, tacos, burgers, nachos, and rotating brunch options alongside local brews. 21+ only.

name: Harvest Beat
description: Seasonal fine-dining with a rotating 5-course prix-fixe tasting menu built around Pacific Northwest produce, foraged ingredients, and artful presentations. Reservations strongly recommended; single evening seating.

name: Juicy J's Smoked Burgers
description: Family-owned 100% plant-based burger shack on the Poulsbo waterfront — in-house smoked patties, Western BBQ Bacon Cheeseburger, Firehouse Burger, and chili cheese fries. Closed Mondays.

name: Kati Vegan Thai
description: Flavorful Thai kitchen known for Cauliflower Bombs, Devil Wings, Old-Style Pad Thai, Khao Soi curry, and Mango Delight dessert.

name: Life on Mars
description: Trendy plant-based cocktail bar and casual restaurant with creative small plates, vinyl-themed vibe, and brunch on weekends. 21+ only.

name: Moe Vegan
description: Family-owned 100% vegan soul food. Bold comfort food classics reimagined plant-based, inspired by the owners' community roots. Open Thu–Sun.

name: Nuttea
description: Taiwanese nut-mylk boba — 100% vegan milk teas made with house-ground nut mylk, nut-cream-topped teas, fruit teas, nut-mylk lattes, and vegan macarons.

name: Pi Vegan Pizzeria
description: Long-loved vegan pizzeria known for Mac & Cheese Pizza, Buffalo Chik'n Pizza, and Artichokey Hokey Pokey Pizza, plus calzones, wings, and salads.

name: Plantiful Superfoods
description: Vibrant plant-based eatery with smoothies, superfood bowls, burgers, pizzas, toasts, and acai bowls. Four locations: Capitol Hill, SLU, Downtown, and Lynnwood.

name: Quickie Too
address_1: 1324 Martin Luther King Jr Way, Tacoma, WA 98405
description: Tacoma's Hilltop vegan soul food institution — hearty burgers, wraps, and sandwiches plus pizza, salads, milkshakes, and sweet potato pie.

name: Rojo's Mexican Food
description: Plant-based Mexican street food — fully vegan tacos, burritos, tortas, and quesadillas with house-made plant proteins and fresh salsas.

name: The Sushi Samurai
address_1: 1817 Queen Anne Ave N, Seattle, WA 98109
description: Creative plant-based sushi spot in Queen Anne offering inventive rolls, appetizers, and nigiri in a cozy setting.

name: Three Cats Coffee
description: 100% vegan coffee shop inside Woodinville Bodega — specialty lattes, breakfast burritos and sandwiches, and a rotating case of vegan pastries, scones, and macarons.

name: Veggie Grill
address_2: 2681 NE University Village St, Seattle, WA 98105
description: Fast-casual vegan comfort food with hearty burgers, sandwiches, bowls, salads, and rotating seasonal specials. Three Seattle locations.

name: Veggie Life
description: Plant-based Chinese restaurant with Vegetarian Peking Duck, Tofu Clay Pot, Kung Pao Tofu, General Tso's Mushrooms, and traditional noodle and rice dishes.

name: Vital Creations Vegan Bistro
address_1: 3601 Fremont Ave N Ste 207, Seattle, WA 98103
description: Fully vegan café and bistro focused on plant-based comfort food and creative daily specials with fresh locally sourced ingredients.

name: Yaygit
address_1: 5309 22nd Ave NW Suite D, Seattle, WA 98107
description: Vibrant plant-based café and juice bar with smoothies, cold-pressed juices, faux tuna and tempeh sandwiches, chia puddings, salads, and avocado toast.
